message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "requirement": "Confidentiality obligations must be defined and include a duration.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement clearly defines confidentiality obligations and specifies a duration of two years post-termination.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 1.1 defines Confidential Information.",
        "Section 1.3 states confidentiality obligations survive for two years after termination."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Indemnification clause must be included.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes an indemnification clause protecting both parties from breaches.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 2.1 states each party shall indemnify the other from claims arising out of breaches."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Limitation of liability must be defined.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes a limitation of liability clause that caps damages.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 3.1 limits liability to $50,000."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Governing law must be specified.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement specifies that it is governed by the laws of California.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 4.1 states the governing law is California."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Termination rights must be defined.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement allows for termination with a 15-day notice.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 5.1 outlines termination rights."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data protection compliance must be addressed.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes a clause requiring compliance with data protection laws.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 6.1 mandates compliance with applicable data protection laws."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data security measures must be implemented.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The agreement requires both parties to implement reasonable security measures for data protection.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 6.1 states parties shall implement reasonable security measures."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Audit rights must be included.",
      "status": "fail",

      "evidence": [],
